question: Who was the Seattle SuperSonics' head coach and team offensive rating in their final season (2007-08)?
notes: PLAN §12 row 2. Verified via fact_coach_season (P.J. Carlesimo, 20-62) + fact_player_game_advanced (AVG off_rating = 96.65 over Regular player-games). Team abbreviation 'SEA' from dim_team_era (the Seattle/Seattle SuperSonics era valid 1996-2008).
